title: Arkansas
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Arkansas

The Arkansas Consumer Assistance Program is run by the Arkansas Insurance Department Consumer Services Division. Staff can answer questions about health insurance regulations, rights, and responsibilities. They can help you file a complaint or appeal a health plan decision. Get consumer help with a problem or question.

Medicaid in Arkansas

You can apply for Medicaid in Arkansas by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Arkansas

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Arkansas

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Arkansas

If you live in Arkansas, you’ll use HealthCare.gov to apply and enroll. For information on resources available in your state, visit the my AR Insurance website.

CHIP in Arkansas

Arkansas CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Arkansas CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Arkansas CHIP.
